title: Two dark solid blocks with a permanent glowing inspection window between them. The blocks are the governed contract — bounded, opaque, immovable. The luminous gap is Precept's Inspect operation: always available, always lit, impossible to close. You can see inside from any state, at any time, without executing anything. Prevention is the closed material; inspectability is the open light.
conceptualBridge: The glowing slot means Precept's inspect operation is structurally permanent because the governed contract is the surrounding solid and the inspection window is a built-in structural opening that cannot be sealed.
decision: Shortlisted for a direct and specific embodiment of the inspect operation, distinctive blue-glow palette, and strong legibility at small sizes.
